summary: Bug fix verification for predio approval flow completed. All 3 reported bugs have been fixed and verified: 1) Coordinador permissions for approval - WORKING, 2) Vigencia format (integer not ISO date) - WORKING, 3) IndexedDB cache bug - WORKING. Backend tests pass 100%. Frontend approval flow works correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test predios in revision state for approval testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs have been verified as fixed: 1) Coordinador can now approve predios (role === 'coordinador' has permission), 2) Vigencia is stored as integer year (2026) not ISO date, 3) IndexedDB cache has try-catch to fail gracefully. The approval flow was tested end-to-end: login as coordinador -> navigate to Pendientes -> click Predios Nuevos tab -> click Aprobar -> click Confirmar -> predio appears in main predios collection with correct vigencia and historial.

bug_1_coordinador_permissions.evidence: Coordinador (Camilo.alsina1@hotmail.com) successfully approved predio 547200001009900010000000000000. API returned success with message 'El predio ha sido APROBADO'

bug_2_vigencia_format.evidence: Approved predios have vigencia=2026 (integer), not ISO date string. Verified via API: GET /api/predios?search=547200001009900010000000000000 returns vigencia: 2026

bug_3_indexeddb_cache.evidence: Frontend loads predios from server when cache fails. Console logs show '[OfflineDB] 8733 predios guardados offline para Sardinata'. Try-catch in Predios.js prevents cache errors from blocking server fetch.

frontend_flow_verification.click_predios_nuevos_tab: SUCCESS - Tab shows predios in revision
frontend_flow_verification.aprobar_button_visible: SUCCESS - Aprobar button visible for coordinador
frontend_flow_verification.click_confirmar: SUCCESS - Predio approved, toast notification shown
frontend_flow_verification.predio_in_gestion_predios: SUCCESS - API returns approved predio with correct data
